authorization.scope: narrow public actor and session lifecycle correction discovered before B2 public lifecycle implementation

discovered_gaps.provisional_destination: The accepted first provisional autosave requires one caller-supplied ProjectStorePath, but the frozen Autosave command, actor placeholder, and config cannot carry it.
discovered_gaps.initial_manual_handoff: The accepted provisional store and initial manual installer exist, but the lifecycle does not say how a provisional or explicitly recovered unsaved branch becomes a durable manual project without mutating or promoting its old refs.
discovered_gaps.recoverable_open: InspectRecovery and OpenRecovery carry no path, so tearing down every failed Open would make the accepted corrupt-head recovery workflow unreachable.
discovered_gaps.public_methods: ProjectStoreActor is one of the frozen sixteen public exports but has no constructor, submission, completion, exit, or joined-shutdown methods.

correction.methods: ProjectStoreActor::start(config) creates one unbound background actor; try_submit is nonblocking and bounded; try_recv is nonblocking; has_exited reports terminal worker state; join performs cancellation shutdown and joins the worker. Drop requests cancellation and remains nonblocking.
correction.ownership: One actor is unbound or owns exactly one held root and its leases. It never owns two live sessions, reopens a just-installed package, exposes a worker handle, or performs filesystem work on the caller thread.
correction.autosave_command: Autosave adds destination: Option<ProjectStorePath>. Unbound plus Some(destination) performs first provisional publication and binds that installed session on durable success. A bound provisional or established session requires destination absent and advances the applicable autosave lane. Every other state/destination combination fails before mutation. The existing Autosaved receipt remains the completion and a provisional receipt has no manual base.
correction.create_unbound: Create on an unbound actor installs the accepted initial manual package and binds the exact returned root and leases without close/reopen. Created returns the resulting ProjectStoreSession.
correction.create_from_provisional: Create on a healthy provisional session is the first-manual handoff. The capture must preserve the held project ID and scientific identity, keep fork provenance absent, and carry a non-regressing revision high-water. It installs an absent destination as a new initial-manual package and transfers actor ownership only after durable success. Failure retains the provisional root, leases, and lifecycle state unchanged.
correction.normal_open: Open on an unbound actor honors ReadOnly or PreferWritable. A healthy established or provisional store returns the actual held session and its authoritative projection. If root/lease establishment or bounded recovery validation fails, Open returns its fault and the actor remains unbound.
correction.recovery_only_open: If bounded recovery validation succeeds but normal authority loading fails, Open returns that normal-open fault while retaining the root and leases in a recovery-only state. That state accepts InspectRecovery, OpenRecovery, FullVerify, Cancel, and Close; all other commands fail before mutation. Successful OpenRecovery returns the selected projection without ref repair and additionally permits SaveAs using that exact selected generation as source. The SaveAs capture uses a new ProjectId and forked_from=(held ProjectId, selected generation), and ownership transfers only after durable success. A later failed Open, OpenRecovery, or SaveAs never silently replaces or repairs authority.
correction.bound_commands: Normal bound sessions retain the accepted ManualSave, SaveAs, Autosave, recovery, Pin, Unpin, PlanCompaction, Trash, Purge, FullVerify, Cancel, and Close behavior. ManualSave remains established-only; a provisional first manual project uses Create, while a recovery-selected project uses only the corrected SaveAs flow.
correction.binding_conflicts: Create and Open submitted while an incompatible session is already bound complete with a typed corruption fault and change no session. Every accepted request still produces exactly one terminal correlated completion.
correction.close_and_shutdown: Close is valid while unbound or bound, cancels queued/active work at accepted safe boundaries, releases any held session, emits the existing Closed completion, and terminates the worker. Joined shutdown emits no new public completion obligation.

superseded_fields: wp10b-project-store-recovery-ahead-correction.json correction.unchanged public-API promise, only for the Autosave destination field
wp10b-project-store-recovery-api-correction.json unchanged commands promise, only for the Autosave destination field
wp10b-project-store-maintenance-transition-correction.json unchanged command-shape promise and matching stop condition, only for the Autosave destination field
wp10b-project-store-trash-safety-correction.json unchanged command-shape promise, only for the Autosave destination field
wp10b-project-store-purge-safety-correction.json unchanged command promise, only for the Autosave destination field
wp10b-project-store-provisional-autosave-correction.json unchanged promise that every command remains unchanged
wp10b-project-store-provisional-autosave-correction.json destination transport left to later public lifecycle work
wp10b-project-store-staging-cleanup-correction.json unchanged command promise, only for the Autosave destination field
invariants: The public root remains exactly sixteen types and the store remains off-product through B3.
No persisted byte, path, generation/ref rule, transition name, fault variant, completion variant, limit, dependency, or product edge changes.
Only the worker performs project filesystem I/O and it owns every held root and lease until Close, shutdown, or an atomic successful destination transfer.
A failed destination operation retains the old session exactly; a failed unbound bind retains no session; recovery inspection and selection never repair refs.
The first-manual handoff never deletes or mutates the old provisional package, and recovery SaveAs never deletes, mutates, or repairs the damaged package.
evidence: exact correction binding, normalized-contract check, and unchanged public-root/dependency/wire/limit guards
public unbound, Create, Open, provisional autosave, first-manual handoff, recovery-only, Close, Drop, and joined-shutdown lifecycle tests
existing queue, correlation, coalescing, cancellation, Save As, recovery, maintenance, and process-crash tests remain green
non_goals: B3 current-source verification, application service or autosave timers
B4 product wiring, predecessor deletion, recovery-area pruning, or product validation
power-loss simulation, filesystem qualification, or a new durability claim
stop_condition: Any persisted byte/path, root export, completion/fault variant, transition, limit, dependency, product edge, timer, recovery-area deletion, or durability claim must change.
rollback: revert this correction and its public lifecycle implementation together while the project-v15 product route remains sole
